name: Advance America
description_short: Advance America offers payday loans ($100-$500), installment loans (up to $1,000), and title loans (up to $25,000) with same-day funding at physical locations and online.
description_long:
Advance America is a nationally recognized lender that operates physical store locations across the country, including the Jacksonville, FL branch at 1020-14 N. Edgewood Ave. The company has built its business around providing fast access to emergency cash for consumers facing short-term financial needs between paychecks. With a 4.9-star rating based on 125,639 customer reviews, the company positions itself as a trusted option for people who need immediate funds.

Advance America offers three primary lending products: Payday Loans ranging from $100-$500 (two to four-week terms), Installment Loans up to $1,000 with multiple payment options and longer terms than payday loans, and Title Loans from $2,000-$25,000 (offered in partnership with LoanCenter, requiring the vehicle as collateral). All products are available both online and at physical store locations. The Jacksonville store operates Monday-Thursday 10am-6pm, Friday-Saturday 9am-4pm (Saturday until 4pm), and is closed Sundays. The company also offers Western Union services.

The Jacksonville location emphasizes bilingual customer service ("Hablamos español") and staff assistance in selecting appropriate loan products. The storefront is positioned in Commonwealth Village, accessible from downtown Jacksonville via North Edgewood Avenue. The company requires government-issued ID, proof of income, active checking account, and Social Security Number or ITIN for loan applications. Customer testimonials highlight staff helpfulness and explanation of loan terms, with one recent review (10/24/2025) praising above-and-beyond service.

As a traditional payday and title lender, Advance America serves consumers in immediate financial distress but operates in a high-cost lending category. Payday and title loans typically carry APRs substantially exceeding 36%, making them expensive short-term solutions. Borrowers should understand these are not alternatives to traditional credit—they are emergency stop-gap measures with significant cost implications. The company's scale (200,000+ Google reviews) indicates broad market reach but does not address whether customers achieve financial stability or enter repeat-borrowing cycles.
pros: Same-day loan funding available in-store for payday and installment loans up to $1,000
Loan amounts up to $25,000 available via title loans using vehicle as collateral
Bilingual staff support in Jacksonville location (Spanish language services confirmed)
Extended repayment terms on installment loans (longer than payday loans) with multiple payment options
Online application option available alongside in-store applications
4.9-star customer rating across 125,639 reviews with documented staff service quality
Multiple loan product options ($100-$25,000 range) for different financial situations
cons: Payday and title loans carry APRs typically 300%+ annually—among the highest-cost consumer credit products
Installment loans limited to $1,000 maximum, insufficient for many larger emergency expenses
Title loan collateral requirement (paid-off vehicle in borrower's name) excludes many consumers
No information provided about credit checks, credit-building benefits, or impact on credit reports
High-cost debt structure creates risk of repeat borrowing cycles and debt traps for vulnerable consumers
best_for: Consumers facing immediate cash needs (within 1-2 weeks) with no other credit options
Vehicle owners needing larger emergency funds ($2,000-$25,000) willing to pledge title as collateral
Borrowers needing flexible repayment schedules (installment loans) rather than lump-sum payday repayment
Spanish-language speakers in Jacksonville area seeking bilingual financial service interaction
diagnosis: Advance America is appropriate for consumers in acute financial distress who need emergency cash within days and have exhausted other options (employer advances, credit union PALs, credit cards). Critical caveat: Payday and title loans are extremely high-cost debt (often 300%+ APR) designed as short-term solutions; borrowers should understand the true cost and avoid repeated cycles, and should explore payday alternatives or non-profit credit counseling first if possible.
services: Installment loans $100-$1,000 with multiple payment options over extended terms
Title loans $2,000-$25,000 using vehicle as collateral (partnership with LoanCenter)
Online loan applications for payday, installment, and title products
In-store loan applications at physical locations
Customer loan product selection assistance and term explanation

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.
